overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the cape-wearing character running through a rain-soaked, foggy urban environment at night. The character moves steadily through wet streets past industrial warehouses and traffic signals, with cinematic lighting reflecting off the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban intersection with traffic control

events.description: overhead traffic light changes from green to red as character approaches the intersection
character continues straight through the intersection without stopping

agents.ego_description: Batman runs steadily through the rainy intersection with cape flowing behind

entered.detail: horizontal pole with suspended traffic signals showing green then red
multi-story building with illuminated signage visible through rain
large multi-level industrial structure with multiple lit windows
rain-slicked pedestrian crossing with reflective white stripes
overpass structure visible in the foggy background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-slicked urban intersection at night. The character runs through the wet crosswalk toward a traffic light gantry that changes from green to red overhead. Industrial buildings loom on the right while a commercial block sits on the left, both partially obscured by heavy rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside industrial warehouse district

agents.ego_description: continuing down the rain-soaked street alongside the industrial building facade

entered.detail: black metal barrier running along the sidewalk edge
tall pole with bright light illuminating the falling rain

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character runs along a sidewalk bordered by a metal fence railing. The industrial warehouse dominates the right side of the frame, drawing closer as the character advances. Street lamps cast pools of light on the wet pavement while the traffic lights fade into the rainy darkness behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with pedestrian under cover

events.description: pedestrian holding umbrella becomes visible standing on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a lone pedestrian standing under an umbrella at the corner

notable_agents.action: standing still under a dark umbrella on the sidewalk near the building corner

entered.detail: large glowing billboard or digital display on the warehouse wall
overhang providing shelter at the building corner entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street corner where the industrial building features a glowing digital billboard. A lone pedestrian stands under an umbrella near a corner awning, providing the only human presence in the scene. The warehouse facade now fills the right side of the frame as the character draws closer to the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban district that shifts from an open intersection to the claustrophobic proximity of an industrial warehouse. It begins with the character sprinting through a wet crosswalk beneath a traffic light gantry that switches from green to red, with heavy fog obscuring the surrounding commercial and industrial blocks. As the character clears the intersection, the camera tracks along a sidewalk bordered by a metal fence, leaving the traffic lights behind in the rainy darkness while street lamps cast shimmering pools of light on the pavement. The scene then tightens as the massive warehouse facade begins to dominate the right side of the frame, drawing closer with every stride. Finally, the movement leads toward a street corner where a glowing digital billboard illuminates the rain and a lone pedestrian stands under an umbrella beneath a dark awning.
